title: Mballases
compiled_truth: Mballases is an external contact at [Hotmail / MSN](companies/hotmail). Over the corpus period (2000-01-21 to 2002-01-30), Mballases sent 6 and received 84 emails, totalling 90 interactions. Top correspondents: [Ebass](people/ebass) (3), [Eric Bass](people/eric-bass) (3), [Stormtrooper](people/stormtrooper-fireman) (2), [Ezra](people/ezra-airmail) (2), [Bhoskins](people/bhoskins-hotmail) (2).
